query:

  ('Mileage', 'The total distance, in miles, travelled', 'Her mileage became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Minority', 'Any subgroup that does not form a numerical majority', 'The essay highlights the minority of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Misanthrope', 'A hater of human kind', 'The essay highlights the misanthrope of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Misanthropic', 'Disliking or avoiding human society', '“The misanthropic old man rarely spoke to his neighbors.”', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Mischievous', 'Causing mischief, injurious', 'The reviewer described the tone as mischievous, which shaped how readers interpreted the claim.', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Misdemeanor', 'A crime punishable by a small fine or a short prison term', 'Scholars noted a striking misdemeanor between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Miserly', 'Like a miser, very covetous, stingy, cautious with money', 'He miserly overlooked details that later proved decisive.', 'adverb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Misinterpret', 'To make an incorrect interpretation, to misunderstand', 'The author hoped the new policy would misinterpret tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Mismanage', 'To handle a responsibility in a way which is inept', 'Critics argued that the plan might mismanage the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Misnomer', 'To use a misleading term, to misname', 'The author hoped the new policy would misnomer tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Misogamy', 'Hatred of or opposition to marriage', 'Over time, the community learned to misogamy its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Misogyny', 'Hatred or contempt for women', 'Scholars noted a striking misogyny between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Misplace', 'To put something somewhere and then forget its location', 'Over time, the community learned to misplace its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Misrepresent', 'Give a false account of', 'What seemed misrepresent at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Misrule', 'Of a trial judge, to make a bad decision in court', 'Critics argued that the plan might misrule the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Missal', 'Any book of prayers or devotions', 'Her missal became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Missile', 'An object intended to be launched into the air at a target', 'Critics argued that the plan might missile the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Missive', 'A written message, a letter, note or memo', 'Scholars noted a striking missive between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mistrust', 'To have no confidence in something', 'The author hoped the new policy would mistrust tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Misty', 'With mist, foggy', 'Her misty became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type)

  example_sentence = EXCLUDED.example_sentence,
